title: Execute Command node fails with EACCES error
symptom: The Execute Command node fails with 'spawn /bin/sh EACCES' after updating n8n. The command works fine when executed directly from the command line.
applies_when: Running n8n in a Docker container on TrueNAS
root_cause: The error occurs because the user running the n8n instance in Docker does not have the necessary permissions to execute the /bin/sh shell. This is likely due to a mismatch between the user IDs of the n8n process and the TrueNAS apps user.
fix_steps: Create a custom Docker image based on the n8nio/n8n image.
Set the user to root and modify the user and group settings to match the TrueNAS apps user.
Rebuild and deploy the custom Docker image.
agent_instruction: Create and deploy a custom Docker image to resolve permission issues.
